Title: Publish clear buyer and seller fee model
Description: Make the current Bidra fee model obvious before users transact.
Acceptance: Fees page states exact current fees or explicitly states launch fees. Listing, order, support, legal, and footer copy point to one fee source.
Regression: Static check verifies concrete fee copy and no vague fee language without current fee.

Title: Upgrade signup and login confidence
Description: Improve auth forms with visible password guidance, password visibility controls, and safer error guidance.
Acceptance: Password requirements are visible before submit. Password visibility controls exist on login, signup, and reset forms. Key auth outcomes have user-safe guidance.
Regression: Auth static check verifies password helper, visibility controls, and safe error mapping.

Title: Make support and contact usable before login
Description: Ensure logged-out users can get help and submit support/contact requests safely.
Acceptance: Logged-out users can submit contact/support or see a clear support email. Support form has success and failure states. Abuse protection exists.
Regression: Public support smoke check verifies logged-out support/contact availability and anti-abuse marker.

Title: Standardize success and failure feedback across core flows
Description: Create a shared feedback pattern for critical marketplace success and failure states.
Acceptance: Create/edit/delete listing, message send/report, offer submit, watch toggle, feedback submit, account save, and admin actions use a shared feedback pattern or documented wrapper.
Regression: Static check maps critical flows to the shared feedback component or wrapper.

Title: Remove remaining native dialogs from production flows
Description: Replace remaining browser-native confirm, alert, and prompt flows with branded UI.
Acceptance: No window.confirm, alert, or prompt remains in app, components, or lib production files.
Regression: Static check rejects native dialog calls in production files.

Title: Mobile premium audit for public marketplace
Description: Harden mobile layout, tap targets, and image stability on critical marketplace pages.
Acceptance: Homepage, listings, listing detail, auth, sell, messages, orders, and watchlist have mobile-safe layout markers and key CTAs meet 44px tap target guidance.
Regression: Static/layout smoke checks critical route coverage and mobile/tap-target markers.

Title: Upgrade homepage conversion path
Description: Make the live homepage explain Bidra quickly and drive users to browse or sell.
Acceptance: Above-the-fold hero states the marketplace promise. Primary CTA leads to browse/listings. Secondary CTA leads to sell/create listing. AU trust, fee, safety, and support cues appear before footer.
Regression: Homepage static check verifies CTA, trust, fee, safety, support, and AU marketplace phrases.

Title: Improve marketplace density and listing quality
Description: Make the marketplace feel populated, real, and searchable across categories and locations.
Acceptance: Homepage and browse show enough real listings by category/location. Placeholder/duplicate listings are removed. Empty categories route to useful alternatives or sell CTA.
Regression: Listing audit checks minimum active count, duplicate titles, missing images, and placeholder phrases.

Title: Validate live marketplace SEO and long-tail acquisition
Description: Harden canonical URLs, sitemap, structured data, and long-tail category/location pages for acquisition.
Acceptance: Production canonical URLs match the live domain. Sitemap includes public listing/category/location pages. Product/listing structured data validates. Category/location pages have unique copy.
Regression: SEO static check verifies metadata generation, production base URL, sitemap coverage, and structured data markers.

Title: Add marketplace funnel analytics
Description: Track core marketplace funnel events without storing sensitive content.
Acceptance: Track visit, signup, listing view, search, watch, offer, message, buy/order, feedback, report, and support events. Events avoid sensitive message content.
Regression: Static check verifies event names and required call sites.
